flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pickens Technical College fell 29% between 2006 and 2009 (93.6% → 66.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Pickens Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (646 vs 861).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pickens Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (609 → 686).
